channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rep. Mike Lawler opposes proposed F-35 sale to Turkey over national security concerns
item.description: Rep. Mike Lawler, a Republican from New York, publicly broke with the Trump administration over a proposed plan to sell advanced F-35 fighter jets to Turkey. In a statement shared on social media, Law...

item.title: From Shadow to Legacy: A Pastor’s Son Reflects on His Father’s Influence
item.description: The article is a personal reflection by Immanuel Etcubañez about growing up as the son of a respected pastor and doctor, and how that shaped his sense of identity. Known in different circles as the so...

item.title: Research shows subtle image perturbations can bypass safety filters in vision-language AI models

item.title: Rep. Mike Levin criticizes Trump for allegedly directing federal prosecutors to investigate elections
item.description: Representative Mike Levin (D-California) criticized President Donald Trump this week over comments suggesting he has instructed federal prosecutors to investigate election outcomes he disputes. Levin ...

item.title: The 1957 Bentley S1 Continental Fastback Sports Saloon, a Classic Example of British Coachbuilt Luxury

item.title: Algeria and Austria face renewed attention over 1982 Gijón controversy ahead of 2026 World Cup group decider

item.title: Professional wrestler Joe Doering dies at 44 after long battle with brain cancer

item.description: The article reports that the Trump administration is facing criticism from anti-immigration activists after quietly issuing a Department of Labor memo that allows dairy farms to make greater use of mi...

item.title: Studio Fashion Photography in Vogue During the Late 1940s and Early 1950s
item.description: The article explores the evolution of Vogue studio photography during the late 1940s and early 1950s, a period often described as a golden age of fashion imagery. It highlights how postwar cultural sh...

item.title: Behind-the-Scenes Photos of Isabelle Adjani During the Filming of The Story of Adèle H. (1975)
